metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the municipal-public-space-enforcement domain.

bricks.name: Deployment Planning and Site Selection
bricks.description: Prioritizes which public-space hotspots should be instrumented, how long equipment should remain in place, and when a site should be moved or escalated.

internalModules.title: Hotspot Scoring Model
internalModules.description: Ranks sites using recurrence, resident complaints, cleanup cost, and enforcement probability.

internalModules.title: Deployment Recommendation Workspace
internalModules.description: Lets operators plan deployment, relocation, and site review decisions.

interfaces.title: Deployment Planning UI
interfaces.description: Used by deployment and operations teams to approve siting decisions.

interfaces.title: Hotspot Scoring API
interfaces.description: Provides scored site recommendations to adjacent workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses Geospatial Incident Map data to understand recurrence and territory coverage.

bricks.name: Solar and Power Reliability
bricks.description: Maintains stable power profiles for field units deployed in low-infrastructure environments.

internalModules.title: Battery and Charge Control
internalModules.description: Manages charge state, battery health, and power thresholds.

internalModules.title: Power Alert Rules
internalModules.description: Raises alerts when field power reliability is at risk.

interfaces.title: Device Power Telemetry
interfaces.description: Reports power state and reliability metrics into the fleet control plane.

bricks.name: Edge Camera and Sensor Unit
bricks.description: The movable field hardware surface that captures suspicious activity and media evidence in selected public-space zones.

internalModules.title: On-device Capture Logic
internalModules.description: Controls event-triggered capture and local media buffering.

internalModules.title: Remote Configuration Layer
internalModules.description: Receives deployment and capture policy updates from the control plane.

interfaces.title: Field Capture Interface
interfaces.description: Physical and digital capture surface operating on municipal hotspots.

interfaces.title: Remote Device Control API
interfaces.description: Remote activation and configuration surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses secure gateway connectivity to transport events and media.
Applies privacy zoning rules before media is persisted.

bricks.name: Secure 4G/5G Connectivity Gateway
bricks.description: Provides secure transport between field devices and the EU control plane without relying on municipal fiber rollout.

internalModules.title: Secure Transport Layer
internalModules.description: Encrypts and routes device traffic into the control plane.

internalModules.title: Connection Policy Manager
internalModules.description: Applies network policies and fallback behavior for unstable field conditions.

interfaces.title: Edge Connectivity Interface
interfaces.description: Connects deployed field units to live platform services.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Carries secure traffic from field devices to the control plane.

bricks.name: Device Health and Fleet Monitoring
bricks.description: Tracks uptime, battery state, connectivity quality, and maintenance needs across the deployed field fleet.

internalModules.title: Fleet Telemetry Store
internalModules.description: Stores health events from all active field units.

internalModules.title: Maintenance Alert Engine
internalModules.description: Triggers relocation or maintenance actions when health degrades.

interfaces.title: Fleet Health Dashboard
interfaces.description: Used by operations teams to monitor and maintain the installed base.

interfaces.title: Fleet Health Event Feed
interfaces.description: Provides status events to deployment and tasking workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses power state signals to understand field reliability.

bricks.name: Privacy Zoning and Masking
bricks.description: Applies configured capture boundaries and masking rules so monitoring remains focused on the relevant public area.

internalModules.title: Field of View Policy Model
internalModules.description: Defines approved zones, exclusions, and capture limits per site.

internalModules.title: Masking and Redaction Engine
internalModules.description: Enforces masking or exclusion rules on captured material.

interfaces.title: Capture Policy API
interfaces.description: Delivers approved zoning rules to field devices and evidence workflows.

bricks.name: Incident Detection Rules Engine
bricks.description: Evaluates field signals and media events to identify suspicious activity likely to represent a municipal offence or nuisance incident.

internalModules.title: Detection Rule Library
internalModules.description: Stores configurable signal and event-detection patterns.

internalModules.title: Real-time Event Evaluator
internalModules.description: Runs the rules against incoming field events.

interfaces.title: Incident Event Feed
interfaces.description: Publishes suspected incidents to triage and operations workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Consumes events produced by field capture units.

bricks.name: AI-assisted Incident Triage
bricks.description: Helps operators review, prioritize, and qualify likely actionable incidents before they become cases or field tasks.

internalModules.title: Priority Scoring Layer
internalModules.description: Scores incidents by likely actionability, severity, and recurrence context.

internalModules.title: Operator Review Queue
internalModules.description: Provides the queue where incidents are reviewed and dispositioned.

interfaces.title: Triage Console
interfaces.description: Operator interface for qualifying suspected incidents.

interfaces.title: Prioritized Incident API
interfaces.description: Provides qualified incidents to case and task workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses detected incident candidates as the input to operator review.
Uses hotspot context to prioritize what matters first.

bricks.name: Geospatial Incident Map
bricks.description: Maps incidents, tasks, recurrence, and deployment footprint across the municipal territory.

internalModules.title: Spatial Incident Index
internalModules.description: Stores incident and intervention records with geospatial indexing.

internalModules.title: Hotspot Visualization Layer
internalModules.description: Presents hotspots, coverage, and recurrence on map views.

interfaces.title: Map UI
interfaces.description: Operational map for hotspot planning and territory review.

interfaces.title: Spatial Context API
interfaces.description: Provides site history and recurrence context to adjacent bricks.

brickDependencies.description: Uses detected incidents to keep the map current.
Uses field outcomes to understand whether hotspots improved.

bricks.name: Evidence Vault and Chain of Custody
bricks.description: Stores evidence, metadata, timestamps, and provenance needed to support enforceable municipal procedures.

internalModules.title: Governed Evidence Store
internalModules.description: Persists evidence securely with case linkage and integrity metadata.

internalModules.title: Chain-of-Custody Tracker
internalModules.description: Records how evidence is accessed, moved, and used in procedures.

interfaces.title: Evidence Access API
interfaces.description: Retrieves case-linked evidence under access controls.

brickDependencies.description: Uses zoning and masking outputs to keep evidence aligned with approved capture boundaries.

bricks.name: Retention and Deletion Scheduler
bricks.description: Applies legal retention windows and deletion rules, including exceptions for ongoing administrative or judicial procedures.

internalModules.title: Retention Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates retention windows by evidence and case state.

internalModules.title: Deletion Execution Workflow
internalModules.description: Runs scheduled deletion and legal-hold actions.

interfaces.title: Retention Policy API
interfaces.description: Provides lifecycle state for evidence governance and audit flows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses evidence metadata and case status to drive retention.

bricks.name: DPIA and GDPR Compliance Workspace
bricks.description: Packages deployment justifications, legal clauses, signage, and DPIA material required for compliant municipal operation.

internalModules.title: Compliance Artifact Library
internalModules.description: Stores DPIA templates, contractual clauses, and signage assets.

internalModules.title: Deployment Compliance Workflow
internalModules.description: Guides approval, review, and renewal of compliant deployments.

interfaces.title: Compliance Workspace UI
interfaces.description: Used by operators and legal stakeholders to manage deployment governance.

interfaces.title: Compliance Status API
interfaces.description: Provides compliance posture to deployment and audit workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses zoning configuration as part of the compliant deployment record.

bricks.name: Access Control and Audit Trail
bricks.description: Controls who can access cases and evidence, and provides full traceability over key actions across the platform.

internalModules.title: Role and Permission Model
internalModules.description: Defines which municipal actors can access which workflows and evidence.

internalModules.title: Audit Event Ledger
internalModules.description: Stores immutable access and workflow events for accountability review.

interfaces.title: Access Policy API
interfaces.description: Applies access decisions to cases, evidence, and integrations.

interfaces.title: Audit Review UI
interfaces.description: Shows who accessed evidence or changed case state.

brickDependencies.description: Applies and records access decisions on evidence objects.

bricks.name: Enforcement Case Workspace
bricks.description: Organizes incidents, evidence, people, case state, and actions into one municipal case record.

internalModules.title: Case State Model
internalModules.description: Tracks incident, case, and sanction lifecycle state.

internalModules.title: Operator Workflow UI
internalModules.description: Provides the main workflow for review, progression, and action.

interfaces.title: Case Workspace UI
interfaces.description: Main operational interface for case handling.

interfaces.title: Case Workflow API
interfaces.description: Exposes case data and progression actions.

brickDependencies.description: Turns qualified incidents into case records.
Links admissible evidence into the case record.

bricks.name: Legal Procedure Templates
bricks.description: Encodes reusable municipal procedure paths, checklists, and required documents for enforcement cases.

internalModules.title: Procedure Template Registry
internalModules.description: Stores reusable procedural flows by case archetype.

internalModules.title: Procedure Guidance Engine
internalModules.description: Determines the next required step based on case state.

interfaces.title: Procedure API
interfaces.description: Supplies required actions and document logic to the case workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses live case context to select the appropriate procedure path.

bricks.name: Notice and Fine Pack Generator
bricks.description: Generates the notice, sanction, and supporting procedural material required to move a case into formal municipal action.

internalModules.title: Document Assembly Engine
internalModules.description: Creates notices and supporting packs from case data and templates.

internalModules.title: Sanction Output Store
internalModules.description: Stores generated documents and their issue state.

interfaces.title: Document Generation API
interfaces.description: Produces notices and sanction packages on demand.

brickDependencies.description: Uses the right procedure path to determine which pack to generate.
Uses case data to populate the generated pack.

bricks.name: Fine Recovery and Treasury Integration
bricks.description: Tracks sanctions and payment state and connects enforcement outcomes to treasury or municipal finance workflows.

internalModules.title: Sanction and Recovery Status Model
internalModules.description: Tracks issue, recovery, and payment lifecycle of fines.

internalModules.title: Treasury Connector Layer
internalModules.description: Synchronizes sanction data with finance and treasury systems.

interfaces.title: Treasury Integration API
interfaces.description: Exchange surface for sanction and payment state.

brickDependencies.description: Uses issued sanction packs to open recovery tracking.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Receive sanction and recovery data and return payment state.

bricks.name: Field Service Task Dispatch
bricks.description: Assigns operational work to municipal services, cleanup crews, and field actors with enough context to act once.

internalModules.title: Task Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Determines which service or crew should receive each operational task.

internalModules.title: Task Tracking Workspace
internalModules.description: Shows open, in-progress, and completed interventions.

interfaces.title: Task Dispatch UI
interfaces.description: Used by operators to dispatch and monitor service work.

interfaces.title: Task Event Feed
interfaces.description: Publishes task creation and completion state to adjacent workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Creates tasks from validated incidents or case states.

bricks.name: Officer Mobile Workflow
bricks.description: Supports field validation, intervention notes, task completion, and case follow-up from mobile surfaces.

internalModules.title: Field Action UI
internalModules.description: Provides mobile task and case views for field actors.

internalModules.title: Offline Sync Layer
internalModules.description: Keeps field updates resilient in patchy connectivity conditions.

interfaces.title: Mobile Workflow UI
interfaces.description: Field-facing mobile interface for officers and crews.

interfaces.title: Field Update API
interfaces.description: Synchronizes mobile actions back into cases and task flows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses dispatched tasks as the starting point for field action.

bricks.name: Interagency Evidence Sharing
bricks.description: Packages and transmits controlled case and evidence material to partner authorities or municipal services.

internalModules.title: Partner Packaging Logic
internalModules.description: Selects which evidence and case fields should be included for each partner flow.

internalModules.title: Transfer Audit Workflow
internalModules.description: Records what was shared, with whom, and under what authority.

interfaces.title: Partner Transfer API
interfaces.description: Controlled transfer surface for partner organizations.

brickDependencies.description: Uses case state to decide when sharing is allowed or required.
Uses governance controls to keep transfers accountable.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Receive transferred evidence and case material.

bricks.name: Municipal Integration API
bricks.description: Connects incidents, tasks, cases, and analytics with municipal ERP, CRM, reporting, and service-management systems.

internalModules.title: Municipal Data Contract Layer
internalModules.description: Normalizes the outbound and inbound data model used with municipal systems.

internalModules.title: Connector Runtime
internalModules.description: Runs integrations and export jobs for municipal systems.

interfaces.title: Municipal API
interfaces.description: Primary structured integration surface for municipal systems.

interfaces.title: Export Jobs
interfaces.description: Batch and event exports for systems that cannot consume APIs directly.

brickDependencies.description: Uses live case data for municipal integrations.
Uses task state to update municipal service systems.

bricks.name: Executive Impact Dashboard
bricks.description: Presents outcome, financial, and operational value proof for elected leaders and municipal executives.

internalModules.title: Executive KPI Model
internalModules.description: Aggregates the metrics used to prove municipal value.

internalModules.title: Leadership Reporting UI
internalModules.description: Provides the visual dashboard used by leaders and sponsors.

interfaces.title: Executive Dashboard UI
interfaces.description: Web interface for leaders and customer success teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses normalized outcomes and benchmark metrics.
Uses recovery data to show financial return.

bricks.name: Resident Communication and Signage Kit
bricks.description: Packages site signage, resident-facing communication, and public information material required for transparent municipal deployment.

internalModules.title: Signage Asset Library
internalModules.description: Stores approved signage and communication assets per deployment archetype.

internalModules.title: Communication Workflow
internalModules.description: Guides what residents should be informed about and when.

interfaces.title: Communication Asset UI
interfaces.description: Used by municipal teams to prepare public communication and signage.

brickDependencies.description: Uses deployment governance state to determine the right public materials.

bricks.name: Outcome Analytics and Benchmarking
bricks.description: Computes outcome metrics, recurrence trends, benchmark views, and longitudinal value proof across sites and municipalities.

internalModules.title: Outcome Metric Pipeline
internalModules.description: Normalizes data from incidents, tasks, cases, and recoveries into outcome metrics.

internalModules.title: Benchmarking Layer
internalModules.description: Supports comparison across sites, periods, and municipalities.

interfaces.title: Outcome Metric Feed
interfaces.description: Provides reusable KPI and benchmark outputs to dashboards and planning workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses hotspot history to understand recurrence and site-level change.
Uses intervention outcomes to quantify operational impact.
Uses sanction and payment outcomes to quantify economic value.
